favorite.preview: As we've explored this semester, the debate over whether AI research breakthroughs should be released as open-source code or kept proprietary has intensified.
You are a regular visitor at the Eastside community library, which currently closes at one o'clock on Sundays.
Chemical compounds are held together by interactions between atoms known as chemical bonds. These bonds determine almost every property of matter.
Long before modern instruments, sailors found their way across the open ocean by watching the stars.
Spring is finally here! The Eastside Campus Community Garden is now open Tuesdays and Thursdays from 4:00 PM to 7:00 PM.
Hope your exam week is going OK. I wanted to flag a problem with our bathroom that has been getting worse, and figure out a plan before the weekend.
